Module 7: The Closing Sequence

Questions to Explore

From Direct Response 2.0 Workbook

Additional Questions:

Closing Themeplates

Themeplate 15: The Perfect For You if…

EXAMPLE:

THEMEPLATE

EXAMPLE

Bonus Themeplates (from Six Figure Emails Pack)

Closing Sequence Checklist:



Questions to Explore

From Direct Response 2.0 Workbook



What about your market’s struggles breaks your heart? 



What reality do you see for them -- that they don’t yet see for themselves? 



What pains you most about their inability to see that potential? 



Additional Questions: 



1. Complete the following sentence: 



“You’re in an EXCLUSIVELY EMPOWERED position to use my product and achieve (promised outcome) if” : 





2. What’s the minimum viable commitment/?



Ie. test it risk-free for 30 days. 

Ie. put the lessons in module 1 into practice

Ie. go through the first audio

Ie. use it just once 

Ie. invest just $1 today to get access to the entire program



3. What’s the QVW (quick and valuable win) that they can achieve with your product within hours or days of getting started? 



4. Describe the ownership experience within MINUTES of your prospect enrolling? What will they see? What will they be doing? How can you pre-pave that reality and make it more familiar? 



5. What positive qualities/characteristics have they exhibited in the past that got them to this point? Can you reflect those qualities back to them to remind them of their POWER to decide and overcome resistance? 



6. Do you have any stories of someone who got in “last minute” and then became a breakthrough success story? 





Closing Themeplates 



Themeplate 15: The Perfect For You if… 



ABOUT: 



The “PERFECT for you if” close is about showing your prospect that your goal is NOT to sell them - but to help them come to the best decision. 



It’s all about genuinely being on their side, taking the sting out of decision anxiety, and creating a VERY real criteria of what makes the perfect buyer.



It’s also the perfect format for sprinkling in all the ingredients that help coach decisiveness: (MVC, QVW, buyer identification, etc.) 



THEMPLATE:



[Urgency: Reminder of how much time/spots are left in your offer]

[Acknowledge that if they’re still seeing this, they’re having trouble deciding]

[Assure them your only commitment is in helping them make the best decision] 

[Take a hard stance against the common “right for you if”] 

[Tell them you only want them to invest if it’s PERFECT for them]

[Alt: How to know if you’ll (experience promised outcome) from (product)] 



[Start with 3 Reasons Not to Buy - using traits they want to distance from OR descriptions of people who are overqualified or too far along to benefit]



[R1] 

[R2] 

[R3] 



[Transition into who it’s PERFECT for, and mention the guarantee to take the edge off - so they feel more safe in self-qualifying]



[Tell them that if they could check off just 5 of the 7 boxes, they qualify]



[Who it’s Perfect for - below is a very flexible list of ways to use those 7 points]



[P1 - The person who’s just getting started and wants to do it right]

[P2 - The person already struggling who wants to fix it once and for all]

[P3 - General desireable trait or characteristic. Ie. willing to put in the work] 

[P4 - Specific trait to back it up - ie. Already investing 4 hours per work actively trying to (achieve X)] 

[P5 - aware of and excited about the big outcome] 

[P6 - aware and excited about the Quick and Valuable Win (QVW)]  

[P7 - Ready to take the Minimum Viable Commitment (MVC)] 



[Tally up their score - how many boxes they checked]



[CTA if they qualify as being a PERFECT fit your product or service] 



[Signoff]



EXAMPLE: 



Subject: 

How to know if you’ll PROFIT from 10x Emails…





Body:



You know those lame emails you’ll usually get at this point of a campaign that shoot off an arbitrary list of ways to know if something is “right for you”.



Ya...ummm… we’re not gonna do that here.



Cause honestly… 



With the doors to 10x Emails shutting down by this time tomorrow… 



I don’t care if 10x Emails is “right for you”



And more importantly YOU don’t care if 10x Emails is right for you.



The only thing EITHER of us should be concerned about at this point is this…



WIll you, your business, or your clients PROFIT from 10x Emails.



That’s it. 



At the end of the day, that’s all we’re shooting for here.



The people who buy something that’s “right for them” are the same folks that wonder why the only “return” they ever get on their investment is a chronic case of of buyer’s remorse.



No thank you.



But before we get into the “profile” of someone who’s poised to profit from this program (wayyy too many “P’s”)...



Here are 3 people who should delete, unsubscribe, and disappear from the 10x Email world foreva: 



You’re a “Ray-Ban” Spammer: If you’re gonna try to use these strategies to shill out scammy products that no one actually wants - be gone.



You’re expecting an “easy” button: This ain’t freakin’ Staples, and anything that’s going to make your CFO (or freshbooks account) happy is gonna require a bit of elbow grease. But here’s the thing… if you’re doing ANY kind of online marketing, then you’re already sending emails. We’re just going to teach you how to get better results in half the time. 



You’re planning for a drive-by: The 60-day guarantee is there to give you every chance to 10x your investment before making a final decision. It’s not there for you to abuse the system by binge-watching the vids, attending the workshops, then peacing out. Keep your intentions pure - and I promise, we’ll make your emails profitable ;-) 



And on that note, if you can check off just 5 of these 7 boxes, then you owe it to yourself, your business and your clients to simply test drive 10x Emails over the next 60 days. 





10x Emails will be PROFITABLE for you if… 



You’re a startup founder, business owner or entrepreneur: By now, you probably realize that email copywriting, unlike other tasks in your biz, isn’t something you can solely rely on a freelancer for. The world moves fast. You need to react quickly. And there’s nothing more disempowering than being straight-jacketed by the whims and weekend plans of a member of the only remaining profession where it’s still cool to drink before noon. Until you achieve a level of minimum viable awesomeness, it’s like having a 500hp engine under your marketing hood - without knowing how to rev it.  



You’re a copywriter (or want to be one): Yes, we want to empower your bosses and clients to get better at this email thing (which in turn, will make them appreciate and value what you do even more)... but here’s the thing. Whether they (or you) know it yet, you’re a vital piece to this marketing machine, and with the skills and templates you’ll learn inside 10x Emails, you’ll get to finally PROVE It in a big way… and if your boss has any kind of good sense… you’ll get paid more for it too. 



You’re a freelancer: When done right (as you’ll learn inside 10x Emails), there is not a single thing you can offer your clients that is more proveable and profitable than email copy. No matter what you’re currently doing for your them (ie. ad campaigns, content, landing pages, etc.), eventually that road is gonna lead to the inbox, and they’re gonna need high-converting emails to close that loop. This is you chance to step in, save the day, and potentially add an extra zero to your next contract. 



You can block off 3 hours on these dates: 



	On August 3rd and 9th we’re gonna SaaS you silly with everything you need to write 

a killer onboarding or nurturing campaign.



And then on August 11 and 15th, we’re gonna follow it up with live online workshops to sequence and WRITE your highest yielding sales campaign to date.



We’re gonna be with you live in the digital trenches, teaching, leading, answering 

questions and making damn sure that you don’t leave the room without the emails 

that can literally 10x your investment on the spot. 



You don’t have time to waste: Yes, ROI is super important to you (and you’ll get it). But ROT (return on time) ranks equally high on your list. 



You don’t have time to mine through 30 hours of video “training” just to get to the good stuff… and at this point, you could care less about David Ogilvy’s life story. You want to start generating more sales TODAY… not in some distant, nebulous future. 



And therefore, you’ll love that everything in 10x Emails is streamlined and strategically engineered for rapid, profitable implementation. 



You realize that email isn’t going anywhere, all roads lead to the inbox, and you’re stoked about the prospect of about picking up the skills, strategies, and marketing power ups that ACTUALLY afford you the right to call your subscriber list an asset.



And finally… 



You’re willing to TEST 10x Emails with no risk: I’m not saying we gotta get married. I’m saying, let’s spend the next 60 days turning your emails into weapons of mass conversion, and unless I make good on my vow to help you grow your revenue (without hiking up your ad spend), then simply hit the “undo” button and we’ll pretend this little fling ever happened. 



That’s it from me.



Tally up your score.



Under 5? 



Maybe next time.



5 or higher…  



Punch in your details so I can send you your welcome email already ;-) 



Peace, love and profits, 

-jo



Themeplate 16: The 7-Digit Doubt Destroyer



About:



7 Digits are worth 1,000 words ;) 



By giving your phone number on the final close, it gives the sense that:



You’re a trusted friend.

You’re real, normal human. 

You’re safe (and won’t run away with their money).

A decision is needed (you wouldn’t leave a friend hanging).



The other thing we’re doing on a more subtle level is creating the condition that “not enrolling” requires a phone call. Which adds friction to non-buying vs. the ease around enrolling. 





THEMEPLATE:



[Open with a reminder of urgency]

[Future pace the immediate ownership experience to make “buying” less scary]

[Normalize or even Glorify procrastination]

[CTA]

[Exclusive Empowerment]

[Minimum Viable Commitment] 

[Offer a phone call if they’re on the fence]

PS: [close with the QVW]





EXAMPLE: 



Subject:

wanna dial me up?

what’s on your mind?

5 minute call?



Body: 



Hey.



 Looks like we’ve got just an hour left before we close up shop on 10X Launches.



We already have about X new members running around the membership site, putting the themeplates to profitable use, and exchanging virtual fist bumps inside the facebook group. 



It’s awesome. 



Anyway…



Thought I’d pull myself away from that party for a sec to see what’s on your mind?



If you’re the “adventurous” type and just wanted to wait till the final minutes before ninja rolling into the membership area, then… 



<Animated GIF - Membership Area> 



Here’s your LAST CHANCE to do your best Indiana Jones impression.



But if you...



Have an online product you’re proud of. 

Have an email list of at least 150 subscribers who’d be happy to hear from you

Have about 60 minutes this week to fire off your first profitable themeplate



… and still don’t feel like you’re in a position to put 10X Launches to a 60-day, risk free TEST to see if it’s “worth it”. 



Then I’d super appreciate it if you dialed me up to let me know what’s on your mind.



Not a “sales call” by any stretch.



Just want to see where you’re at, and find out how I can best help you. 



(figure i owe you that much for spending all this time with me over the last few weeks).



Anyway, here’s my number (plz don’t share): 



X-XXX-XXXX



P.S. 



Once again, most product owners and online entrepreneurs are able to at least DOUBLE their investment within a few hours. 



As long as you have a validated offer and an email list (however small) to send it to…



… all you really need is about 50 minutes of poking around Module 7 to pick out your favorite sales themeplate and fire it up into your email provider.



If you’re up for the test, and would rather chat with me on facebook group then on the phone…



Go ahead and take the 50 Minute-ROI Challenge above…



Then reach out to let me know you’re “in”. 



Themeplate 17 - The Psycho-Cybernetic



About: 



This themeplate is all about honoring the resistance and difficulty they’re likely having around the investment decision.



Instead of downplaying how hard it is to make a decision, we simply validate it, and then call on our prospect to temporarily put on the “mask” or assume the identity of someone capable of making a decision.



This template hits heavily on the “buyer identification” and “binary choice” triggers mentioned in Module 7. 





THEMEPLATE:



[Reminder of Time Urgency]

[future pace the outcome or big transformation - who will they become]

[link it to the person they must to become right now to achieve it]

[sell against indecisiveness]

[call on them to become decisive] 

[offer a binary choice] 

[minimum viable commitment] 

Optional PS [share your own struggle with indecisiveness and how you overcame it]

[Binary choice part 2] 

 

EXAMPLE:



Subject:



[2 HOURS] Mick Jagger, Michael Jordan & The Matrix

“It’s just a click away. It’s just a cliiiiick away” 



Body: 



About 90 mins left till we shut it down, so let me be snappy… 



When you enroll in 10X Launches, you can expect that in about 4-6 weeks from now (or less), you’ll be the rare breed of online course creator, coach, consultant or entrepreneur with the power to…  



… fill up those “email” icons on your funnel map with the “magical” words that make your paypal blink. 



… write those words faster and with more confidence than it took you to hire it out last time. 



… never feel bottlenecked or helpless again, kicking yourself for trying to outsource the SINGLE TASK most responsible for bringing revenue into your business and putting 20 year single malts into your whiskey glass.



*cheers to that*



It’s a helluva transformation if you ask me.



But to be honest… that’s the easy part. 



Cause it’ll only be possible if you FIRST become the kind of entrepreneur brave enough to get over the anxiety hump and lock down your spot in 10X Launches right now.



The kinda business owner capable of making a DECISION.



(no, sorry… letting that ugly countdown timer hit zero, then shrugging your shoulders and saying “oops, guess I missed it” isn’t the same thing).



So here’s the deal…



I’m gonna spare you the motivational hyperbole, the “red pill vs. blue pill” BS, or the “you miss 100% of the shots you never take” instagram quote card material.



We’re not in the Matrix (or are we)... 



… and you’re not Michael Jordan (or are you). 



Instead, I’m going to invite you, for JUST A FEW SECONDS, to be the type of confident business owner capable of making a decision.



To either… 



>>> Jump into 10X Launches knowing that if you’re not adding extra digits to your next funnel or product launch, you can hit “undo” without any real consequence.



Or to say….



>>> Nuff already! I enjoyed all the free stuff in those workshops, but please, get out’a my life so I can continue second-guessing every word I write, and blaming other people when my funnel never gets off the ground. 



So can you do that for me? 

Can you make a choice? 



And I get it.



Nobody is 100% confident, 100% of the time.



Not even freakin’ Neo or MJ.



But all you need is 3 minutes of being “confident enough” to finish up your enrollment, grab your login info, and then meet us over in the private facebook group so we can give you a proper hero’s welcome.



Cool?



We’ll be waiting here when you’re ready



(sign off) 



PS. 



Confession:



 Even when I know something’s right for me and my business, I still wait till the last second before pulling the trigger. 



I’m not your typical “action taker”.



I mull, I muse, and I mess up a perfectly good google doc trying to assess and analyze the decision from every possible angle.



And then… after all that inevitably fails.



I brew a pot of extra bold Kicking Horse Coffee.



Put on the Bose headphones



And blast some “Gimme Shelter” as I climatically hit autofill  on the checkout page.



Cuz in the wise words of one Mick Jagger…



“You’re just a click away…. You’re just a click away” 





PPS. In about an hour, I’m gonna send out a FINAL warning. (if I don’t, ppl will freak out and complain I didn’t warn them).  



<screen shot from convertkit dashboard> 



Here’s the thing…



I don’t want you to get it.



By that time, I want you to either:



Be diving headfirst into the membership area, and sharing your “personal power jam”  in the fb group. 



Have consciously decided that NOPE. Not for me. Not today. Not ever. And feeling damn proud about your ability to walk away from a raging inferno with middle fingers in the air. 



Themeplate 18 - The Danny Tanner



About: 



Danny Tanner was a fictional character on the 90’s tv show “Full House” who became famous for his timely pep talks at the end of an episode.



Usually resulting in acceptance, forgiveness, hugs, tears, redemption and cheesy music.



So 20 years later, what does he have to do with writing a sales email? Quite a lot actually :) 



In the final hours of a launch, your prospect is likely feeling a combination of fear, anxiety around the deadline, self-judgement around NOT being in a position to pull the trigger sooner, and a host of other “stuff” that’s non-conducive to the conversion.



So instead of procrasta-shaming them, and pouring the FOMO on thicker, we help them acknowledge that this is “normal”, congruent with other people who have bought, and a natural part of the overall process.



We also contrast the (instantly curable) pain or resistance around the BUYING DECISION against the (less curable) pain in not deciding and resuming their old reality.



This creates a powerful effect I call “pain anchoring”. 



Finally, we build them back up by reminding them of other wins and successes they’ev had -- and the positive qualities they’ve cultivated along the way.



Qualities that we’ll need them to make present to take the next step. 



Cue the cheesy music. 



THEMEPLATE:



[Reverse Procrasti-Shame. Show them it’s OK they haven’t enrolled yet while also drawing attention to the deadline]

[Validate their resistance around investing]

[Drop the guarantee] 

[Show that this resistance is perfectly congruent with buying behavior - a prerequisite even]

[CTA] 

[Compare the resistance in buying to the pain around the MOHT] ← pain anchoring

[CTA] 

[Highlight qualities you admire or appreciate about them]

[Remind them of how those qualities have served them in the past]

[Show them that those qualities will serve them now]





EXAMPLE:



Subject: 



Whatsup Jen! 



5 hours left, and I noticed you still haven’t grabbed your seat inside the End The Yoga Hustle Masterclass.



So I just wanted to check in and say….



That’s. Totally. Cool.



:)



Yep. 



Even with the 60-Day, “double your yoga rate” Guarantee and all…



It’s still a big-ish decision.



In fact, if I remember correctly,  some of our BEST students waited till the final minutes.

before finally standing up and saying “I’m ready”.



Not only that, but they came in with a lot of… umm… “stuff”.



… “is this masterclass really worth the investment”



… “can I REALLY double my rate just by taking an online class?” 



… “will those 7 extra revenue streams I’ll be learning about really work for me? What if I’m not tech savvy?”



… “is this gonna stretch me too far outside my comfort zone? I don’t want to be pushy, or have to sell… I just want to chill out, flow with life, and trust that it’ll all work out.



Sounding familiar yet? 



Here’s the thing. 



You’re not meant to join the program with all your stuff all “figured out”.



This is a place where you’re invited to BRING your “stuff”.



Your doubts, your fears, your sense that “this will never work for me”... 



… and simply surrender yourself to the proven roadmap that’s been worked for hundreds of yoga teachers from literally every corner of the world.



So if you’re ready to take the FIRST STEP in ditching the yoga hustle…



…. the running from studio to studio, ignoring the fact that your uber bill is more than your hourly rate.



… secretly sharing the same doubts that your friends and family have expressed (although you’d never admit it to them out loud) 



… and feeling generally “un-yogic” about the fact that some teachers *make it* while others don’t. 



Then I invite you to officially assume *Yoga Crush* Status by taking this special 8-week journey with me, .



TIll then…



Keep Crushin’ It,



(sign off)



<EVERGREEN TIMER>



PS. Even though the clock is ticking...



Here’s why I’m not worried about you, Jen. 



You’ve been down this path before.



When the whole world told you that you should keep “playing it safe” instead of venturing off to do this yoga thing, you still had the courage to pursue it.



You know how flippin rare and awesome that is? 



And even though you’ve had to contend with probing questions and veiled smiles every time the “career conversation” comes up…



… you STILL had the power and conviction to go with what in your heart, you knew to be true.



So now… even though I’m inviting you to take a scary step forward in re-defining yourself and making the shift from underpaid, overworked yoga teacher → thriving, in-demand yoga professional…



I trust that you’ll consciously choose what feels right in your heart.



The only thing I ask is that you actually *choose*. 



Let’s do this! I’m a *bit* scared, but can’t wait to give it a risk-free shot! 



Nope! Definitely not my vibe. Thx but no thx



Either way… It’s been such a pleasure having you on this journey.



If you make it into the Masterclass, then I’ll catch up with you a little later on inside the facebook group (drop me a PM to let me know what you’re most excited about).



If not, look forward to finding new ways to serve your AWESOME journey.



Themeplate 19 - The Co-Creative Close



About:



This themeplate leverages a few key principles that help coach decisiveness. 



We invite co-creation, which gives our prospect a sense of power and ownership over the outcome. 



We also take the spotlight of off them for a moment, and frame the offer as their chance to help us fulfill our mission to help them.



The big pull of this email however, is in presenting and coaching BINARY CHOICE. 



Instead of the prominent question in their mind being “Do I want this product or not” it becomes “Do I want this bonus or the other one” which in their minds, presupposes the purchase. 



This technique can also be done with payment and package options that feel customized for your prospect’s success.  





THEMEPLATE



[Open with Deadline Urgency]

[quick mention of the full transformation that awaits]

[declare your PERSONAL want for them to join]

[Using the MOHT, talk about why this is important to you in an almost selfish way]

[Ask them what they need to make it happen]

[Give Option #1 to counter a big objection like time or money]

[Give Option #2 to counter a second big objection like their own self doubt]

[Option to put a scarcity limit on either extra bonus]





EXAMPLE



Subject:

[8 Hours] what can I do? 

(closing) Which one of these should I hook you up with? 



Body:



Hey Jen. 



I’m reaching out cause I need a little favor here…



In a few hours, the “End The Yoga Hustle Masterclass” will be shutting down for 6 months while we support hundreds of new members in their quick ascent from overwhelmed and underpaid yoga teacher…



…  to FULLY FLEDGED Yoga Crush, earning what they’re worth and creating multiple new revenue streams that deepen their impact and support a life of greater flow and abundance.



And here’s the thing…



I really want you in here.



I created this program because it absolutely rips me apart to see good-hearted yoga teachers wrestle with burnout before caving into the pressure from friends and family to go back to a “normal job”.



The world doesn’t need anymore overworked yoga teachers stretched more thin than their favorite lulu’s.



And if you’re at this critical, *make or break* juncture of your career…



…  it would absolutely break my heart to see you miss out on your chance to finally step into your fullest potential as a yoga teacher -- and share that abundance and openness as a gift to all those you serve.



Which begs the question…



What do you need most from ME to help make that happen?



BONUS OPTION #!:



If the investment is still a little “scary” for you, or your time is so stretched thin that you’ll only realistically be able to invest 1 or 2 hours/week in learning and implementing, then I’m happy to offer you an EXTENDED “double your yoga rate” guarantee. 



Instead of the normal 30 day guarantee, you’ll get a FULL 2 MONTHS to learn and implement the lessons, and from the new place of clarity, power, and abundance, you can make a final decision about whether or not this was the best investment you’ve ever made in your growth as a yoga professional.



>>> Awesome! A FULL 60 DAYS really helps me a ton! That will really allow me the space and time to apply what I’m learning and give this an honest shot. 



BONUS OPTION #2: (FOR THE NEXT 20 ENROLLMENTS)



Or, if you do have the time, and are eager to implement right away, but are still feeling some stinging doubts about whether this is “right for you”, or if you, yes YOU, will be capable of implementing the lessons and putting them into action… then I want to offer a second option (only pick one of the two plz)... 



Here, you’ll get two personal, 1-ON-1 COACHING SESSIONS!

We’ll Skype it up for 20 minutes each time -- the first in week 2, and another in week 4 which are the critical spots for building and maintaining momentum.



This will make sure you stay on track, get the FULL benefit of the program, and get over any personal hurdles that may be keeping you from unleashing your fullest potential as a yoga professional.  



As it stands, this is the ONLY way to get personal access to me. And because I need to be very careful about creating boundaries around my own time (you’ll learn about that in Module 5)... I’m capping this at the next 20 Enrollments. 



>>> Wow! Just what I needed. Can’t wait to jam :) 



Whatever you decide, I just want to ask that you make and FULLY OWN your decision.



If the time isn’t right for you. Be cool and at peace with that.



But if you know that that's just the fear talking, I invite you to step up, and choose the extra bonus that will serve you most in the coming weeks.



Bonus option #1: A FULL 60 DAYS to double my rate before making a final decision. 



Choose Bonus #1



Bonus Option #2: Two private coaching calls to make sure I stay on track and become a standout success story. 



Choose Bonus #2



Lots of love,



(Sign off) 



Closing Sequence Checklist:

Have I coached my prospect on:



Minimum viable commitment

Quick and valuable win

Binary choice

Objections/Questions/Resistance as a valid part of being a “buyer”
